approach: Implement cascade debugging by integrating git blame, task_id mapping, and commit parsing into a modular tool with isolated test cases.

steps.description: Implement git blame integration to extract commit metadata
steps.test_hint: Verify git blame returns commit hash and author for known files
Check task_id lookup returns valid UUIDs for sample commits

steps.description: Parse commit logs for task_id associations
steps.test_hint: Validate parsed logs contain expected task_id patterns
Confirm agent assignments match pre-defined task_id mappings

steps.description: Build cascade tracing function for failing tests
steps.test_hint: Trace error path from test case to original commit

steps.description: Write unit tests for git blame integration
steps.test_hint: Verify blame output matches mocked commit history
